form.formComment: Is a four start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when second (17.95) over 324m at this track. Has finished in the money at the last three starts. Rates highly and is the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Is a four start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when second (17.95) over 324m at this track. Has finished in the money at the last three starts. Rates highly and is the one to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 50m mark raced tightly and came together.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last in a Maiden on April 13 over 400m at Maitland behind Zipper Stride beaten 22 lengths (23.89). Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished last in a Maiden on April 13 over 400m at Maitland behind Zipper Stride beaten 22 lengths (23.89). Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room on the turn out of the back straight and was checked.

form.formComment: Has ability but remains a maiden after four starts, the most recent effort a sixth (18.20) over 324m at this track. Can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has ability but remains a maiden after four starts, the most recent effort a sixth (18.20) over 324m at this track. Can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Maiden on April 9 over 324m at this track behind Battle Speed, beaten 6 lengths (18.20). Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Maiden on April 9 over 324m at this track behind Battle Speed, beaten 6 lengths (18.20). Hard to have this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow into stride.

form.formComment: First starter by Tommy Shelby from Yuko Girl. From the Kristy Sultana kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First starter by Tommy Shelby from Yuko Girl. From the Kristy Sultana kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 2.5 lengths behind Pay Me over 324m. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 2.5 lengths behind Pay Me over 324m. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Turned in a sound debut over 324m at this track where he settled on speed and stuck on well to finish third (17.96). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Turned in a sound debut over 324m at this track where he settled on speed and stuck on well to finish third (17.96). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 250m to 150m mark raced tightly and came together multiple times.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 324m at this track beaten 5 lengths (18.07) behind Battle Speed in a Maiden on April 9. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 324m at this track beaten 5 lengths (18.07) behind Battle Speed in a Maiden on April 9. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Missed the frame on debut over 324m at this track when fourth (18.79) and beaten 16 lengths. Should be further improved. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame on debut over 324m at this track when fourth (18.79) and beaten 16 lengths. Should be further improved. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start came together; At the finish galloped awkwardly.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 2.25 lengths fifth over 324m at this track. This looks too tough.
